title: 7 Bathroom Upgrades for a Spa-Like Sanctuary
excerpt: The bathroom is the easiest room to transform on a small budget. These 7 upgrades — from fluffy towels to ambient lighting — turn any bathroom into a space you actually want to be in.
author: At Home Plans Team

pinterestPins.headline: Ambient Light + Natural Scent
pinterestPins.subCopy: Two things that make a bathroom feel luxurious

body:
The bathroom gets overlooked in most home design conversations — which is exactly why a small investment here makes such a disproportionate difference. Replacing thin towels with thick, waffle-weave ones; adding a tray to organize the countertop; swapping harsh overhead light for a warm candle or diffuser — these are changes that cost under $50 each and feel transformative every single day. These 7 upgrades take a bathroom from functional to restorative.

## Shop the List

- [Waffle-Weave Bath Towel Set](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-84101233)
- [Bamboo Bath Tray](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-94685951)
- [Round Vanity Mirror with Warm Lighting](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-87014520)
- [Ceramic Soap Dispenser + Dish Set](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-88410025)
- [Eucalyptus + Reed Diffuser](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-82082692)
- [Teak Bath Mat](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-83914102)
- [Over-Door Towel Rack](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-91201554)
